result:
Here are the specific files and functions involved in CRM loyalty points redemption:

---

### Routes
- **`app/Http/routes.loyalpoints.php`** — Dedicated loyalty routes file; redemption route at line 37: `POST /{chainID}/redeemLoyaltyPoints` → `MQLoyalController@redeemLoyaltyPoints`

### Controllers
- **`app/Http/Controllers/MQLoyalController.php:380`** — `redeemLoyaltyPoints(Request $request)` — entry point controller method
- **`app/Http/Controllers/OrderController.php:3489`** — `sendRedeemOTP(Request $request)` — triggers OTP before redemption
- **`app/Http/Controllers/OrderController.php:3508`** — `sendRedeemCreditNoteOTP(Request $request)`
- **`app/Http/Controllers/EasyRewardzController.php:227`** — `redeemCoupon(Request $request)` — EasyRewardz CRM coupon redemption
- **`app/Http/Controllers/v2/reportController.php:4130`** — `customerLoyaltyPoint(Request $request)`
- **`app/Http/Controllers/v2/reportController.php:4148`** — `storeLoyaltyPoint(Request $request)`
- **`app/Http/Controllers/reportController.php:2943`** — `fetchLoyaltyPointLedger(Request $request)`

### Model/Service Classes (core logic)
| Class | File | Key Functions |
|---|---|---|
| **`MQLoyal`** | `app/MQLoyal.php:9` | `redeemLoyaltyPoints()` (line 294) — MQ Loyal CRM redemption |
| **`Mobiquest`** | `app/Mobiquest.php:13` | `redeemLoyaltyPoints()` (line 1572) — Mobiquest CRM redemption |
| **`EasyRewardz`** | `app/EasyRewardz.php:11` | `redeemCoupon()` (line 282) — EasyRewardz coupon redemption |
| **`Order`** | `app/Order.php` | Points update during order: lines 6591–6613, 10998–11040, 15316–15345; `manageLoyaltyPoint()` (line 23784); `voidOrderLoyaltyPoint()` (line 23982) |
| **`Message`** | `app/Message.php` | `sendRedeemOTP()` (line 462) — sends OTP for redemption; `sendRedeemCreditNoteOTP()` (line 622) |
| **`Store`** | `app/Store.php:229` | CRM config defaults (`redeemPoints`, `loyaltyRedeemType`) |
| **`chainSetup`** | `app/chainSetup.php` | CRM settings setup: `redeemPoints` (line 3185), `loyaltyRedeemType` (line 3319), bulk recalculation (lines 3357–3380) |
| **`Customers`** | `app/Customers.php` | `redeemPoints`/`redeemAmount` config read (line 262), customer point balance queries |
| **`Scripts`** | `app/Scripts.php:10108` | `loyaltyPointExpiry()` — expiry handling |

### Background Jobs
- **`app/Jobs/QBLoyaltyJob.php:15`** — `QBLoyaltyJob` — async loyalty point processing
- **`app/Jobs/VoidLoyaltyPointJob.php:14`** — `VoidLoyaltyPointJob` — async void/reversal
- **`app/Jobs/PladaLoyaltyJob.php:13`** — `PladaLoyaltyJob` — Plada-specific loyalty
- **`app/Jobs/SendEasyRewardzOrderLog.php:16`** — async EasyRewardz order logging

### Reports
- **`app/report.php:19789`** — `fetchLoyaltyPointLedger()`
- **`app/v2/report.php:19267`** — `fetchLoyaltyPointLedger()` (v2)
- **`app/v2/report.php:26779`** — `customerLoyaltyPoint()`
- **`app/v2/report.php:26798`** — `storeLoyaltyPoint()`

### Schema
- **`cloud_schema/chain.sql`** — `customers` table (`pointsCollected`, `pointsRedeemed`, `availablePoints` columns)
- **`cloud_schema/globals.sql`** — CRM settings table with `redeemPoints`, `redeemAmount`, `loyaltyRedeemType`

### Cron/Commands
- **`app/Console/Commands/checkLoyaltyPointExpiry.php:21`** — `checkLoyaltyPointExpiry` command
- **`app/Console/Commands/SendPointsExpiryMessage.php`** — sends expiry notifications

---

**Flow summary**: Redemption goes through `MQLoyalController@redeemLoyaltyPoints` → dispatches to either `MQLoyal::redeemLoyaltyPoints()` or `Mobiquest::redeemLoyaltyPoints()` depending on CRM provider. During order placement, `Order.php` directly updates `pointsRedeemed`/`availablePoints` on the `customers` table (lines ~6591–6613 and ~10998–11040). OTP verification via `Message::sendRedeemOTP()` is required before redemption.
